CustomField.description: Auto-maintained by the Insurance recalculation flow. Total number of active coverage plans the contact holds = sum of Medical/Dental/Vision across the contact's active-policy associations (ContactInsuranceAssociation where linked Insurance Status = Active), counting at least 1 per active policy. E.g. one group-health policy with Medical+Dental+Vision = 3; a Medicare policy = 1. Do not edit manually. (가입 플랜 수 - 자동 계산, 수동 편집 금지)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-calculated total number of active plans (Medical/Dental/Vision counted separately, min 1 per policy); do not edit manually. (활성 플랜 수 자동 계산. 수동 편집 금지.)
CustomField.label: Total Plans
